title: Measured line coverage is 36.2% despite 34 passing tests
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.362 (jest text-summary Lines %); defect_rate=1.0 confirms build+tests pass. Suite (tests/acceptance.test.ts, tests/unit.test.ts) has 34 it-blocks, 0 skipped.
suggestion: Reconcile the coverage signal: the low number is inconsistent with the suite's apparent reach and is most plausibly driven by the src/app.ts coverage exclusion (see cov-2) or a scoring-env native-module rebuild; confirm all files are instrumented.

title: jest.config.js excludes src/app.ts (the HTTP route layer) from coverage collection
evidence: jest.config.js:9 collectCoverageFrom includes '!src/app.ts' — the entire Express route layer, which is the ATDD System-Under-Test, is omitted from coverage measurement.
suggestion: Remove the '!src/app.ts' exclusion so the acceptance tests' coverage of the routes is measured; excluding the largest source file hides the primary deliverable from the coverage metric.

title: Unused module-global DB handle alongside closure-captured db
evidence: db.ts:14,31-37,110 define appDb/setAppDb/getAppDb/shutdownDb; app.ts:24 calls setAppDb(db) but every route handler uses the closure `db` (app.ts:38,46,53,68,78), so getAppDb is never read.
suggestion: Drop the module-global handle (setAppDb/getAppDb/appDb) or route handlers through it — keep one source of truth for the DB connection.

title: Create/read representation mismatch for omitted year/isbn
evidence: db.ts:55 & db.ts:87 return year: year ?? 0 and isbn: isbn ?? '' while db.ts:53/86 persist NULL; a POST/PUT omitting year/isbn responds with 0/'' but a later GET (db.ts:58-71 SELECT *) reads back null.
suggestion: Return the persisted representation (null) consistently, or persist 0/'' — align the create/update response with what GET returns.

title: Non-idiomatic SCREAMING_CASE function names in db.ts
evidence: db.ts:98 COUNT_ALL and db.ts:104 COUNT_BY_AUTHOR are functions named in all-caps (reserved by convention for constants); idiomatic score=0.7.
suggestion: Rename to countAll / countByAuthor to match TypeScript camelCase conventions.
